description: Journy.io is a customer-journey and product-usage data platform for B2B software teams. It lets companies track users, accounts, events, segments, websites, and in-app messages to understand customer behavior and drive sales or marketing workflows.
summary: Journy.io exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.journy.io`, authenticated with workspace API keys managed in the product’s connections screen; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaces were found.
